methods.description: Earn commission (5–15%) on sales you drive via a trackable link. Zero follower requirement — start immediately.
methods.how_to_start: Apply to Amazon Influencer Program (any follower count) or LTK (1k+ on Instagram/TikTok).

methods.description: A brand pays you to post a photo or carousel featuring their product. Rate is set per post.
methods.how_to_start: Use the Brand Collab DM template in your Templates tab. Start with small/local brands.

methods.description: Short-form video sponsorship. Higher rates than static posts due to production effort and reach.
methods.how_to_start: Pitch brands that already run TikTok/Reels ads — they understand the format and have budget for it.

methods.description: Ongoing relationship with one brand — monthly content deliverables in exchange for flat fee + product.
methods.how_to_start: Use the Affiliate / Ambassador Application template. Target brands you already use.

methods.description: Gaming-specific sponsorships: peripheral brands (Razer, SteelSeries), energy drinks (G Fuel, Monster), or gaming chairs (Secretlab). Often includes product + revenue share + stream overlays.
methods.how_to_start: Apply to Razer Streamer Program, HyperX Creator, or G Fuel Sponsorship directly from their websites.

methods.description: Recurring income from Twitch Affiliate/Partner. Viewers pay $4.99–$24.99/month to subscribe; you earn 50% (Partners can negotiate 70%).
methods.how_to_start: Reach Twitch Affiliate requirements: 50 followers, 500 total minutes broadcast, 7 unique broadcast days, avg 3 concurrent viewers.

methods.description: Sell your own products: photo presets, video templates, recipe ebooks, workout plans, art brushes. 100% margin.
methods.how_to_start: Create one product using Gumroad, Stan Store, or Payhip. Announce it in your link in bio.

top_recommendation_by_bracket.0-1k: Start with affiliate marketing — it requires zero followers and pays from day one. Focus on Amazon Influencer or LTK.
top_recommendation_by_bracket.1k-10k: You're ready for paid brand deals. Send 3 Brand Collab DMs this week using the template — your engagement rate matters more than follower count at this stage.
top_recommendation_by_bracket.10k-100k: Negotiate ongoing ambassador deals over one-off posts. Recurring monthly income is more valuable than sporadic sponsored posts.
top_recommendation_by_bracket.100k+: Diversify: combine brand deals with a digital product or course. One product launch can outperform 6 months of sponsored posts.
